info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Billing Document API
info.description:
Read, cancel, and retrieve billing documents in PDF format from SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV) provides access to billing document headers, items, partners, and pricing elements. Supports invoices, credit memos, debit memos, and other billing document types as part of the order-to-cash cycle.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support

item.name: Retrieve a list of billing documents

query.description: Maximum number of records to return

request.description: Returns a collection of billing document headers. Use OData query options to filter by billing date, billing type, sales organization, customer, or cancellation status.
